arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes telling admission about Man Utd struggles and points to Rasmus Hojlund
arts.sum: Manchester United take on Real Sociedad in the Europa League as Red Devils boss Ruben Amorim attempts to find some positive momentum at Old Trafford following a difficult start

arts.ttl: Amorim 'in a hurry' to win trophies at Man Utd
arts.sum: Amorim has said he is "in a hurry" to win trophies at Man United while also admitting that the club heirachy recognise he needs time to deliver success

arts.ttl: 'Show loyalty' - Roy Keane rips into Sir Jim Ratcliffe after Man United's £2bn stadium plans
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Roy Keane has taken aim at Red Devils co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe after the club announced plans to build a new 100,000-seater stadium

arts.ttl: Denmark manager makes bold Rasmus Hojlund Man United claim - 'form speaks for itself'
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund has been picked to represent Denmark during this month's international break despite his form at Manchester United

arts.ttl: Man Utd new stadium plans 'pathetic' while team underperforms - Merson
arts.sum: Manchester United are more interested in building a state-of-the art stadium than they are in producing a competitive football team that challenges for silverware, argues Paul Merson.

arts.ttl: Man United's £2bn stadium plans are 'PATHETIC' and fans should be 'fuming', blasts Paul Merson as he rings alarm over Sir Jim Ratcliffe
arts.sum: The pundit believes the plans are pointless, distract from the club's on-field plight, and should have fans up in arms. United will try to build 'the world's greatest stadium' with a 100,000 capacity

arts.ttl: Real Sociedad XI vs Manchester United – Predicted lineup
arts.sum: Real Sociedad make the trip to Manchester United in a huge Europa League tie tonight. Amid disappointing domestic campaigns for both teams, Europe offers an avenue to a successful season. The contest is evenly poised after a 1-1 draw in San Sebastien last week. arts.ttl: Paul Merson tears into Man United new stadium plan as brutal Sir Jim Ratcliffe point made
arts.sum: Manchester United are planning to build a new 100,000-seater stadium with Old Trafford set to be demolished, but Sky Sports pundit Paul Merson isn't impressed
